3319680.name: Delve Survivors
3319680.description:
Delve Survivors blends classic turn-based dungeon crawling with the intensity of modern horde survivor games.

Pick new skills for each unique run, upgrade your build, and delve into multiple dungeons as you blast through swarms of enemies in pursuit of deeper floors and ever rarer loot.

CORE FEATURES

Turn-Based Roguelike Meets Horde-Survivor

A unique fusion of classic, grid-based roguelike dungeon crawling with the overwhelming enemy density and ever expanding skill combinations of modern survivors games. Every action advances time, giving you full control over how fast or slow and methodical you want the pacing to be!

Horde Survivor Style Passive Combat

Melee attacks are performed automatically when you move into an enemy tile, and your expanding loadout of skills all go off automatically after a turn based cool down.

Build powerful combinations with AoEs, status effects, summons, and more!

ARPG-Style Loot & Itemization

Collect and equip items across familiar rarity tiers: Magic, Rare, Legendary, and Unique.

Gear enhances stats, strengthens your abilities, and can even unlock new synergies across your build.

Classic Roguelike Progression & Permadeath

Dungeons are procedurally generated with randomized loot, and player death results in one of three possible conditions, based on your preferred rogue experience. 

Casual Mode : For a forgiving RPG experience.

          Keep all your loot and world progression even if you die.

Casual Rogue : For Rogue-lite fans.

          Start back at the first dungeon, but keep your loot!

Hard Core : For the True Rogue Experience

          Lose all loot and progress when you die!
Town Hub Upgrades

Return to Town Hub between dungeons to:

  • Upgrade weapons and armor

  • Improve class-based stats

  • Exchange items across characters of the same Game Mode.

  • Purchase potions and or magic scrolls to prepare for challenging runs

Boss Battles That Test Your Build

Each dungeon has elite enemies, mid level bosses, and an ending final boss encounter that challenges your mastery of game mechanics like resource management, build synergy, and character positioning.
3319680.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 俄语, 繁体中文, 韩语
